query:
INSERT INTO orderItems (orderId, productId, productName, quantity, unitPrice, totalPrice, complements, notes)
SELECT 
  o.id,
  2,
  'Refrigerante 2L',
  2,
  '12.00',
  '24.00',
  '[]',
  NULL
FROM orders o WHERE o.orderNumber = '#IFOOD-TEST-001' ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT 1;
